{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.6": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised version improves logical flow and clarity, but does not walk the entire argument chain end-to-end.",
    "R1.4": "Identifies a specific prior work (soft-penalty approaches) and contrasts with it, though more could be done to map against related works.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is improved significantly, with fewer repetitions and clearer language, but minor issues remain in phrasing.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for the claim about online recalibration capability, which may or may not be substantiated by evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Covers exactly the agreed active set without drift.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content but could benefit from more explicit downstream-harm considerations.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, though some changes are not directly traceable to specific edits."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised version improves logical flow and clarity, but does not walk the entire argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.4: Identifies a specific prior work (soft-penalty approaches) and contrasts with it, though more could be done to map against related works.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is improved significantly, with fewer repetitions and clearer language, but minor issues remain in phrasing.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for the claim about online recalibration capability, which may or may not be substantiated by evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Covers exactly the agreed active set without drift.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content but could benefit from more explicit downstream-harm considerations.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, though some changes are not directly traceable to specific edits.
